task.summary: First event done :pray: and event smth
Now SlEvent.UnregisterAll() will end all events before clearing Instances
Version bump & editing stupid implementation of StartEvent()

So it's like 12:30 AM and I felt really funny when I learned about partial class + I hate spawning objects and making them follow player, so I'm creating my own wrappers, which might get more additions (prob will be getting that many as I'll need)
There will be a lot of changes

MESSAGE.value: First event done :pray: and event smth
Now SlEvent.UnregisterAll() will end all events before clearing Instances
Version bump & editing stupid implementation of StartEvent()

So it's like 12:30 AM and I felt really funny when I learned about partial class + I hate spawning objects and making them follow player, so I'm creating my own wrappers, which might get more additions (prob will be getting that many as I'll need)
There will be a lot of changes

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: There will be a lot of changes
